title: Dropdown to text
excerpt:
Currently I have two boards that are connected and mirroring data. But not I need to mirror data from the dropdown menu, but it seems this isn’t featured. Is there a work around for this? 
Thanks!

posts.author: ajkW (Alice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently I have two boards that are connected and mirroring data. But not I need to mirror data from the dropdown menu, but it seems this isn’t featured. Is there a work around for this?

Thanks!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ajkW I suggest you check out VLOOKUP app that helps auto-linking between multiple boards using dropdown menu.

Here is a demo video of such a usecase How to use VLOOKUP to auto assign person to role on monday.com board - YouTube

Hope this helps
